overview: True Size Map is an interactive educational world map that lets you compare countries by their real size, population, or GDP. Drag any country anywhere on the map, switch between map projections, and instantly see how countries compare to each other.
features: Real geographic shapes for all 195+ countries
Drag and reposition up to 6 countries simultaneously
Switch between Mercator and equal-area projections
Compare countries by area, population, or GDP
Save and load favorite country comparisons
Export the map view as a PNG image
